mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Post (title, content, created_at, category_id, user_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, NOW(), #{categoryId}, #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM Post WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM Post WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE Post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category_id = #{categoryId}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE Post SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Comment (post_id, parent_comment_id, content, created_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{content}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM Comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE Comment SET content = #{content}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE Comment SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM Like_Post WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Like_Post WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Like_Comment (comment_id, post_id, user_id) VALUES (#{commentId}, #{postId}, #{userId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM Like_Comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Like_Comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}

SELECT p.*, COUNT(lp.post_id) AS like_count FROM Post p LEFT JOIN Like_Post lp ON p.post_id = lp.post_id WHERE p.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) AND p.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY p.post_id ORDER BY like_count DESC, p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM Post WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.post_id, p.title, SUBSTRING(p.content, 1, 20) as content, p.created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Like_Post WHERE post_id = p.post_id) as like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Comment WHERE post_id = p.post_id AND deleted_at IS NULL) as comment_count FROM Post p WHERE p.category_id = #{categoryId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Post WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
